_status: draft — written against the official Stripe MCP (@stripe/mcp) published tool names; tool sets vary by version and --tools flags. Verify: re-run `agentloss gateway init` against YOUR server and diff, then confirm with agentloss_doctor. Amounts are Stripe minor units (amount_divisor 100); zero-decimal currencies (JPY, KRW, ...) need the SDK detector (agentloss.detectors.stripe) instead.

list_disputes._note: census=false: a disputes list is not a complete catch of errors on invoices/refunds. Set census=true only when every captured decision is a payment that disputes fully cover.
